ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "new_52w_high_price" TEXT /* New 52-week high price */,
  "prev_high_price" TEXT /* Previous high price */,
  "prev_high_date" TEXT /* Date of the previous high price */,
  "ltp" TEXT /* Latest trading price (LTP) */,
  "prev_close_price" TEXT /* Previous close price */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Change in price */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in price */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the security data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price for the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read by the user */,
  "alert_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
